description: Documented test cases for validating each KQL detection before production. The labs execute the Python mirrors; this file records how the KQL itself would be validated in a Sentinel staging workspace. No live KQL is executed here.

detections.name: MFA Fatigue (Push Bombing)
detections.positive_sample: 5 SigninLogs ResultType 500121 for one user in 10 min + an approved MFA sign-in within 30 min
detections.negative_sample: 1 missed prompt then an approval, no burst
detections.false_positive_case: Device re-enrolment generating a short prompt burst with no attacker IP
detections.regression_case: Burst straddling two 10-min bins must still fire (sliding-window check)
approval_checklist: FP review vs 30 days of real prompts

detections.name: Impossible Travel Sign-in
detections.positive_sample: Two successful sign-ins implying >900 km/h travel
detections.negative_sample: Two sign-ins from the same city
detections.false_positive_case: Both IPs in corporate VPN egress 198.51.100.0/24
detections.regression_case: v1.1.0 exclusion must suppress VPN pair but keep the foreign-IP true positive
approval_checklist: VPN egress ranges confirmed with network team

detections.name: Conditional Access Policy Modified or Deleted
detections.positive_sample: Update CA policy event by a non-CA-admin actor
detections.negative_sample: CA policy update by an authorised CA administrator with a change ticket
detections.false_positive_case: Approved change-window edit by the identity platform team
detections.regression_case: Deletion (not just update) must also fire

detections.name: New Credential Added to Service Principal
detections.positive_sample: Add SP credentials on a high-privilege app
detections.negative_sample: Add SP credentials on a low-privilege monitoring app
detections.regression_case: Certificate add (not just secret) must fire
detections.tuning_variable: high-privilege app watchlist, approved rotation principals

detections.name: Account Added to Privileged Role or Group
detections.positive_sample: Add member to Global Administrator, self-elevation
detections.negative_sample: Add member to a normal project group
detections.regression_case: Group add (sg-prod-domain-admins) as well as role add must fire

detections.name: Anomalous CyberArk Privileged Credential Checkout
detections.positive_sample: 4+ ticketless checkouts in 60 min, or any 00:00-05:00 ticketless checkout from the domain-admins safe
detections.false_positive_case: Emergency change with a retrospectively raised ticket
detections.regression_case: Quiet-hours single checkout must fire even below the burst threshold
approval_checklist: Tier-0 safe list agreed with PAM team

detections.name: Stale or Orphaned Privileged Account
detections.positive_sample: Enabled privileged account, no sign-in for 60+ days
detections.negative_sample: Active privileged account signing in daily
detections.regression_case: Orphaned service account (no owner) escalates severity

detections.name: Risky sign-in from unusual location
detections.positive_sample: High-risk successful sign-in from a non-usual country
detections.negative_sample: Baseline sign-in from the user's usual country
detections.false_positive_case: Legitimate travel or VPN egress in another country
detections.regression_case: Must not fire on a failed high-risk sign-in (blocked already)

detections.name: MFA fatigue leading to approval
detections.positive_sample: 5 failed strong-auth events then an approval within 30 min
detections.negative_sample: Failed prompts with no subsequent approval
detections.regression_case: Approval requirement must hold (no approval => no alert)

detections.name: Privileged role activation without change record
detections.positive_sample: Application Administrator activation with no ticket
detections.regression_case: All protected roles covered, not just Application Administrator

detections.name: Credential added to high-privilege service principal
detections.false_positive_case: Approved rotation on a high-priv app

detections.name: Subscription or resource group permission change
detections.regression_case: Subscription-scope grant fires as well as RG-scope

detections.name: NSG or firewall rule opened to the internet
detections.regression_case: '*' and 'Internet' source values fire as well as 0.0.0.0/0
detections.tuning_variable: public prefix list, workload tag exclusions
approval_checklist: pairs with deny policy in Audit

detections.name: VM management endpoint exposed
detections.positive_sample: Internet-open management-port rule on a VM with a public IP
detections.negative_sample: Same rule on a VM with no public IP
detections.regression_case: Reachability (public IP) required - permitted-but-unreachable must not fire

detections.name: Correlated identity-to-control-plane chain
detections.negative_sample: 3 unrelated benign events on a shared service account
detections.false_positive_case: Over-merge on a shared service account
detections.regression_case: Requires >=3 distinct stages; 2 stages must not raise the chain
